title: Buddhist Nuns in Society
host: Founders: Ayya Khema, Chatsumarn Kabilsingh, Karma Lekshe Tsomo
about: The very first Sakyadhita International Conference, held at the Kalachakra Temple in Bodhgaya, India — the site of the Buddha's awakening. Founded by Ayya Khema, Chatsumarn Kabilsingh, and Karma Lekshe Tsomo, it established Sakyadhita and named women's ordination as the movement's signature concern.

photos.caption: Opening ceremony of the International Conference on Buddhist Nuns · Bodhgaya, 1987
